diagnosis: Nail gun injury to the skull
symptom: a headache and a small scalp wound after a nail gun misfired at work
hook: a full construction nail was buried deep inside the skull
whatYouSee: A long construction nail driven straight through the skull into the brain.
whyItMatters: A nail gun can drive a nail into the brain through a tiny entry wound so the injury is easily missed without an X-ray.
treatment: It needs urgent neurosurgery to remove the nail and control bleeding and infection.
takeaway: A radiopaque nail crossing the skull into the brain is a penetrating nail gun injury.

condition.diagnosis: Nail gun injury to the skull

condition.hook: a full construction nail was buried deep inside the skull
condition.view: lateral skull radiograph one view filling the frame with no other body part
condition.keyFindings: a single long radiopaque construction nail penetrating the cranial vault with its flat head outside the skull and its pointed tip lodged deep within the brain
condition.whatYouSee: A long construction nail driven straight through the skull into the brain.
condition.whyItMatters: A nail gun can drive a nail into the brain through a tiny entry wound so the injury is easily missed without an X-ray.
condition.treatment: It needs urgent neurosurgery to remove the nail and control bleeding and infection.
condition.takeaway: A radiopaque nail crossing the skull into the brain is a penetrating nail gun injury.

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a headache and a small scalp wound after a nail gun misfired at work.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And a full construction nail was buried deep inside the skull.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Nail gun injury to the skull

👀 What you see:
A long construction nail driven straight through the skull into the brain.

🦴 Why it matters:
A nail gun can drive a nail into the brain through a tiny entry wound so the injury is easily missed without an X-ray.

💊 Treatment:
It needs urgent neurosurgery to remove the nail and control bleeding and infection.
